channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in the US
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the US — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: The Map of Longing — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · Just released — verdict soon — Before her death, Lucy creates a game for her sister, Greta, pushing her into a journey of self-discovery — and toward the charming Will Tucker.

item.title: I Will Find You — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — Wrongfully imprisoned for murdering his own son, a father sets out on a desperate rescue mission after learning the boy may still be alive.

item.title: Obsession — Peacock Premium
item.description: Peacock Premium · English · ★ 8.3 · Must watch — After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Miguel Ángel Blanco: The 48 Hours That Changed Spain — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · Not enough ratings yet — This documentary explores how Miguel Ángel Blanco's 1997 abduction turned fear into collective resistance and shaped Spain's fright Against ETA terrorism.

item.title: I'm Not Afraid — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — 10-year-old Miguel stumbles upon a terrifying secret involving a boy trapped in a hole near his home.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.8 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Hulu
item.description: Hulu · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Young Washington — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — Before he led a nation, George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict. With alliances crumbling and war closing in, he must choose who to…

item.title: Silo — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Crossing — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — A retelling of the Red Army crossing the Chishui River four times to outmaneuver 400,000 enemy troops.

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — YouTube TV
item.description: YouTube TV · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: I Know Who You Are — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — On 1949 October 1, the day of the founding ceremony of the People's Republic of China, Xiao Dali enters the city and is reorganized as the director of the…

item.title: Oasis — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · ★ 6.3 · Decent one-time watch — Oasis is the most luxurious holiday resort in the country — a paradise reserved for the wealthiest families, featuring private beaches, VIP facilities, and…
